name: claude-code-wechat
description: Connect WeChat to Claude Code — chat with Claude Code directly from WeChat, with multi-user sessions, file sharing, and slash commands

scripts.build: bun build channel-mode/main.ts --target node --outfile dist/channel-mode.js && bun build setup.ts --target node --outfile dist/setup.js && bun build sdk-mode/main.ts --target node --outfile dist/sdk-mode.js && node scripts/strip-bun-marker.cjs
